name: Vadodara Specialty Chemicals Pvt Ltd
profile_semantic: Specialty chemical plant in the GIDC industrial estates of Vadodara, Gujarat, India. Manufactures food-grade emulsifier blends (E471 mono- and diglycerides with E414 gum acacia) for beverage and bakery applications. Sole-source producer of Northwind Provisions' emulsifier feedstock. Monsoon-flood-prone low-lying estate.

name: Asha Food Ingredients Ltd
profile_semantic: Tier-1 ingredient blender in Navi Mumbai, India, compounding emulsifier systems and dry-blend premixes for granola and snack-bar production lines. Receives emulsifier feedstock from Gujarat by road.

name: Van Doorn Ingredient Works B.V.
profile_semantic: Tier-1 beverage-ingredient house in the Port of Rotterdam, Netherlands. Compounds emulsifier and botanical flavor emulsions for sparkling beverage production. Imports emulsifier feedstock from India and botanical extracts from southern France.

name: Jurong Fine Ingredients Pte Ltd
profile_semantic: Food-grade emulsifier and lipid-systems manufacturer on Jurong Island, Singapore. Produces E471/E414 beverage and bakery emulsifier blends to FSSC 22000, Halal and Kosher standards. Holds finished-goods buffer stock; offers expedited air dispatch from Changi within 48 hours.

name: Provence Lipides SAS
profile_semantic: Lipid-chemistry specialist near Lyon, France, producing emulsifier systems for dairy and beverage applications. Strong EU regulatory record; production typically allocated a quarter ahead, so new-order lead times run long.

name: Ingredientes Occidente S.A. de C.V.
profile_semantic: Food-ingredient producer in Guadalajara, Mexico, supplying emulsifier blends to North American snack manufacturers. Short lead times into the US but limited spare capacity; minimum-order flexibility is poor.

name: Cooperativa Café Sul de Minas
profile_semantic: Coffee-growing cooperative around Varginha in the Sul de Minas belt, Minas Gerais, Brazil. Supplies specialty-grade arabica green coffee. The region is frost- and drought-exposed in the June–August window.

name: Cascade Roasting Co.
profile_semantic: Contract coffee roaster in Portland, Oregon. Roasts and grinds arabica green coffee for Northwind's cold-brew line; receives green beans from Brazilian cooperatives via the Port of Santos.

name: Cooperativa Cafetera del Huila
profile_semantic: Arabica cooperative in Pitalito, Huila, Colombia. Cup profile compatible with Sul de Minas lots; qualified backup origin for cold-brew green coffee with reliable Buenaventura export logistics.

name: Gulf Aluminium Smelting Co.
profile_semantic: Primary aluminium smelter in Bahrain producing rolling slab for beverage-can sheet. Feeds East Asian rolling mills by bulk carrier.

name: Ulsan Rolling Mill Co.
profile_semantic: Aluminium rolling mill in Ulsan, South Korea, producing can-body and end-stock sheet. All trans-Pacific shipments route through the Port of Busan — a strike- and typhoon-exposed chokepoint.

name: PacWest Can Manufacturing
profile_semantic: Beverage-can plant in Stockton, California, forming 12 oz cans from Korean can-sheet for the cold-brew and sparkling lines.

name: Pelican Polymer Films LLC
profile_semantic: Petrochemical film extruder in Lake Charles, Louisiana, producing PET/BOPP laminate packaging film for bar wrappers. Sits in the hurricane-exposed US Gulf Coast petrochemical corridor.

name: Prairie Gold Oats Ltd
profile_semantic: Oat miller in Saskatoon, Saskatchewan, supplying rolled oats for granola production from prairie contract growers.

name: Grasse Botanique SARL
profile_semantic: Botanical extraction house in Grasse, France, producing elderflower and yuzu extracts for the sparkling botanical beverage line.
